title: agalinis stenantha
intro: Agalinis stenantha, also known as downy false foxglove, is a perennial plant native to North America, belonging to the family Orobanchaceae. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of respiratory issues, such as coughs and colds, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Agalinis stenantha include its ability to soothe sore throats, reduce fever, and alleviate congestion, making it a valuable remedy for respiratory infections. Agalinis stenantha can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infused oil, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
